metadata.title: Readoption pursuant to G.S. 150B-21.3A(c)(2)g of 10A NCAC 13J

elements.alt: Seal of the State of North Carolina

elements.text:
STATE OF NORTH CAROLINA
OFFICE OF ADMINISTRATIVE HEARINGS

content.text:
Mailing address:
6714 Mail Service Center
Raleigh, NC 27699-6714

Street address:
1711 New Hope Church Rd
Raleigh, NC 27609-6285

Nadine Pfeiffer, Rulemaking Coordinator
Department of Health and Human Services
Medical Care Commission
2701 Mail Service Center
Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-2701
Re: Readoption pursuant to G.S. 150B-21.3A(c)(2)g of

Attached to this letter are the rules subject to readoption pursuant to the periodic review and expiration of existing rules as set forth in G.S. 150B-21.3A(c)(2)g. After consultation with your agency, this set of rules was discussed at the August 18, 2016 Rules Review Commission meeting regarding the scheduling of these rules for readoption. Pursuant to G.S. 150B-21.3A(d)(2), the rules identified on the attached printout shall be readopted by the agency no later than January 31, 2018.
If you have any questions regarding the Commission’s action, please let me know.
